title: Work-Package Run Manifest v1.0
description: Provenance envelope for Work-Package-level numerics outputs (NPZ, HDF5, or JSON data files). Provides the same envelope shape as schemas/manifest_v2.schema.json (schema_version, code_version, repository, execution, provenance_hash, payload), plus a WP identifier and an artifact pointer for binary data files.

code_version.description: Version of the underlying simulation engine (e.g. scripts/stroboscopic_sweep.py CODE_VERSION).

runner_version.description: Version of the WP-specific runner script (e.g. wp-strobo-2p0/numerics/run_sweep.py).

parameter_document.description: Pointer to the experimental_params_v1 document this run derived from, if any.

artifact.description: The data file this manifest describes. The manifest itself is a sidecar.

path.description: Path to the data file, relative to the repository root.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the raw data file bytes.

host.description: Optional host identifier; omit if sensitive.

provenance_hash.description: SHA-256 over a canonical JSON form of {wp_id, code_version, runner_version, payload, artifact.sha256}. Verifies that the manifest's input description matches the data file.

payload.description: WP-specific scientific payload. Free-form, but conventionally contains physical_parameters, grid, observables_per_cell, derived_observables, tags.
